issues.description: Action type 'FlipLife' is incorrect. The card effect adds Characters to Life cards (face-up), which is 'AttachDon' or a custom Life card placement action. 'FlipLife' flips life cards face-down. The DSL should reflect adding up to 1 Land of Wano Character to Life cards, not flipping them.
Missing condition to filter for {Land of Wano} type Characters and exclude [Kouzuki Momonosuke]. The action needs conditions or target specification to match card text.
The count and placement logic (top or bottom of Life cards) is not properly captured in current action structure.
